channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Nvidia, AMD back $100M round for AI tooling startup RadixArk
item.description: RadixArk Inc., a startup that provides tools for artificial intelligence developers, has raised $100 million from a group of high-profile backers. Nvidia Corp.’s NVentures fund led the seed round with Spark Capital. They were joined by Advanced Micro Devices … [Intel, Nvidia, AMD]

item.title: AMD forecasts revenue above expectations on strong AI demand, shares jump 12%
item.description: May 5 : Advanced Micro Devices forecast second-quarter revenue above Wall Street expectations on Tuesday, helped by keen demand for its data-center chips as cloud-computing companies accelerate spending on artificial-intelligence infrastructure. Shares of the… [Intel, AMD]
